summary: Frontend UI testing complete for Dashboard preview cards, sidebar nav styling, and color updates. All 8 required features verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: Dashboard has 3 preview cards at bottom (Vault, Messages, Checklist) in 3-column grid on desktop
Checklist preview card shows progress bar with orange gradient
Checklist preview card shows recent items with check/circle icons
Checklist preview card has 'View Full Checklist' link in orange (#f97316)
Vault preview card has blue left border (border-l-[#2563eb] = rgb(37, 99, 235))
Vault preview card has blue icon and 'View All Documents' link in blue (#2563eb)
Messages preview card has purple left border (border-l-[#8b5cf6] = rgb(139, 92, 246))
Messages preview card has purple icon and 'Create Message' link in purple (#8b5cf6)
Checklist preview card has orange left border (border-l-[#f97316] = rgb(249, 115, 22))
Checklist preview card has orange icon and 'View Full Checklist' link in orange (#f97316)
Sidebar nav items are larger: font-size: 15px (verified)
Sidebar nav items have larger icons: 22px x 22px (verified)
Sidebar nav items have increased padding: 14px 18px (verified)
Sidebar nav items have button-like styling: border-radius: 12px, gap: 14px, border: 1px solid transparent (verified)
Active nav item has gold border-color: rgba(224, 173, 43, 0.2)
Vault stat tile uses darker blue gradient (--card-vault: linear-gradient(135deg, #2563eb 0%, #1e3a8a 100%))
Readiness breakdown dot for Docs uses updated blue (#2563eb = rgb(37, 99, 235))
Preview card links navigate correctly: Vault->'/vault', Messages->'/messages', Checklist->'/checklist'
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Mitchell Family Estate data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard UI changes tested and verified. All preview cards (Vault=Blue, Messages=Purple, Checklist=Orange) display correctly with color-coded left borders, matching icons, and properly colored links. Sidebar nav items are enlarged with 15px font, 22px icons, 14px 18px padding, 12px border-radius, and button-like styling. Vault blue updated to #2563eb across the app (stat cards, readiness dots, preview cards). Navigation from preview cards to respective pages works correctly.
